emails.subject: Counterparty- Genesis Ventures
emails.body: Counterparty- Genesis Ventures Tom/Tana- Genesis ventures migrated last night. The counterparty needs to be retouched on the 5 European products (read only) and also US Recycled ONP Physical (trade). I would appreciate it if you could revisit this counterparty when you get a chance. Best Regards, Nicole Hunter Clickpaper Support Team 713-345-8438
